---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability — usually a new state-manager detector or a UX improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What would you like to see?
<!-- e.g. "Detect Jotai atoms" or "Group nodes by source folder" -->

## Why
<!-- The concrete problem this solves. What does the lack of it cost you today? -->

## Proposed approach (optional)
<!-- For new state managers: which APIs (`atom()`, `useAtom`, etc.) and how the node should be labeled. -->
<!-- For UI: rough sketch / wireframe / inspiration links. -->

## Alternatives considered
<!-- React DevTools? Other tools? Why don't they fit? -->
